About Us

15 years sailing the Mediterranean with the same passion as day one. Discover the story and the team that makes Rumbomed your home at sea.

  1. Home
  2. About Us

Redefining sailing on the Costa del Sol, one voyage at a time

Born from a deep love for the sea and freedom, we have spent 15 years turning our passion for sailing into unforgettable experiences for those seeking to discover the essence of the Mediterranean.

50+ Countries
15K Happy Sailors
Our Story

15 Years of Passion for Boat Rentals on the Costa del Sol

What began as a personal fascination with the horizon has transformed into a nautical reference on the Costa del Sol, dedicated to creating extraordinary days at sea.

We believe that sailing is not just moving from one point to another; it is connecting with the freedom of the Mediterranean, respecting marine life, and discovering the calm that can only be found away from the shore.

Every trip we organize is imbued with a deep respect for our environment and a commitment to offering impeccable service. Our team of professional skippers works hand-in-hand with the experience gained over these 15 years, to offer you authentic sightings and exclusive corners of our coast that most tourists never get to know.

Our Vision

"To be the benchmark of nautical excellence on the Costa del Sol, transforming every trip into a unique connection with the sea and consolidating our 15-year trajectory as a guarantee of unforgettable moments."

Why Choose Rumbomed?

Our experiences are built on six fundamental pillars that guarantee excellence in every departure.

Local Experts

Deep knowledge of Malaga, Marbella, and Estepona

We are not just skippers; we are passionate about the Mediterranean. We know every hidden cove and the best spotting points.

Total Safety

Rigorous protocols and certified crew

Your well-being is our priority. Daily fleet maintenance and professional skippers so you only worry about the sun.

Conscious Sailing

Absolute respect for the marine ecosystem

We follow strict whale-watching protocols and environmental care to ensure the Mediterranean stays vibrant.

Our Logbook: 15 Years Sailing

A journey through the miles that have forged our experience.

2004

The Beginning

A passionate team decided to share the beauty of the Mediterranean with the world.

2011

Expansion

Extending our routes from Estepona to Marbella and Malaga.

2024

Heading to the Future

Renewing our fleet with cutting-edge technology and premium services.
